metadata.title: Th0mzzz
metadata.description: Eu sou Thomaz, um desenvolvedor Full Stack apaixonado por tecnologia e inovação e esse é meu portifólio profissional.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I develop solutions that span both frontend and backend using mainly JavaScript, with a focus on creating and integrating APIs and working with complex data structures.
about.paragraph2: I build designs that are simple, accessible, and guided by solid UI/UX principles to improve how people interact with systems. I’ve worked on projects that simplify and automate workflows, digitalizing processes and helping teams work more efficiently

proactivity.title: Pro-activity
proactivity.description: I always work hard to be proactive, seeking out errors, finding new solutions to problems and organizing workflows.

teamwork.title: Team Work
teamwork.description: I’m good making new connections and keeping the workspace more positive and efficient.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.description: I always look forward to help my co-workers and organize projects and ideas.

about.profileAlt: Homem jovem branco com cabelos cacheados e barba curta castanhos claros, usando uma camisa azul clara, sorrindo e olhando para a câmera.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Some projects that i've worked on, showcasing my skills and experience in various areas of software development.

1.title: Jandira Official Website
1.description: 'Jandira Official Website' is an official website for the city of Jandira, providing information about the city, its history, culture, tourism, and public services like city announcements and event listings and digital services. The website features a modern design, responsive layout, and interactive elements to enhance user experience.
1.quote: Jandira at your fingertips — everything about the city, in one place.

2.title: QuasArt
2.description: Quasart is your new go-to destination for exploring the world of entertainment — movies, series, books, stand-up, podcasts, and theater, all in one place. Built to highlight what's trending and tailored to your preferences, your next favorite is just a few clicks away. Whether you're a fan hungry for new discoveries or a business looking to expand your reach, Quasart is where it all comes together.
2.quote: Create your own universe and let your creativity flow through videos, reviews, and profiles.

journey.title: My Journey
journey.description: A timeline of my professional experience and academic background, showcasing the milestones that have shaped my career in software development.

1.title: IT Advisor - Web Developer
1.description: I'm currently working as an IT Advisor/Web Developer at Jandira's City Hall, providing technical support to various departments and developing web applications that improve internal processes and public services.

2.title: Internship - Web Developer
2.description: Internship focused on web development, building internal web applications and providing technical support to various departments.

3.title: Information for Internet Technical Course
3.description: An Technical course focused on software development, covering programming fundamentals, database management, web development, and software engineering principles.

4.title: Software Engineering
4.description: A Bachelor's degree program in Software Engineering, covering software development methodologies, programming languages, database management, and software architecture.

5.title: English Course
5.description: An intensive English course focused on improving communication skills, including listening, speaking, reading, and writing.
